text.value: Laboratory Report
Laboratory studies

Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Urinalysis shows significant leukocyturia, positive nitrites, bacteriuria, and >100,000 CFU/mL E. coli, indicating a urinary tract infection. Presence of hematuria and proteinuria is noted. Low specific gravity may suggest dilute urine. No ketones or casts detected. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of antibiotic therapy based on sensitivity testing.

text.value: Ahmed Wirth

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
